blended.narrative: Blacktail Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,845 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 20.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 15" over the past week. Current depth: 50".
